allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'status': d['status'], 'session_id': d['session_id'], 'uid': d['uid'], 'turns_summary': [{'turn': t['turn'], 'user': t['user'], 'bot': t['bot'][:2] if t['bot'] else [], 'raw_events_count': len\(t.get\('raw_events',[]\)\), 'first_raw_event': t['raw_events'][0] if t.get\('raw_events'\) else None} for t in d['turns']], 'transcript_len': len\(d['transcript']\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Config OK — OpenAI configured:', d['openai_configured'], '| Model:', d['openai_model']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; t=json.load\(open\('tests.json'\)\); print\(f'{len\(t\)} tests, keys per test:', list\(t[0].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Requirements length: {len\(d[\\"requirements\\"]\)} chars'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} use case\(s\):', [x[\\"name\\"] for x in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} tests, first:', d[0]['test_id'] if d else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Use cases:', [x['name'] for x in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('versions:', [v['version'] for v in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK, use cases:', len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Server up, use cases:', len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Variables:', r['summary']['variables']\); print\('Tools:', r['summary']['tools']\); print\('Agents:', r['summary']['agents']\)")
